ItacAcademyItem.Name: Invitti (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Some sources say that the Invitti changed its name to Timidi in 1648. See Francesco Tonelli, Scienze e scuole secondo il piano di alcuni autori (Mantua: Erede di A. Pazzoni, 1791), p. 46; Luigi Carnevali, Cenni storici sull` Accademia Virgiliana (Mantua: Mendovi, 1886), pp. 14-15; and Maylender, iii, p. 376. The Accademia dei Timidi can be found elsewhere on the database.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
